message:
fix(threadStatus): rename loop variable to avoid shadowing outer kickoff

The loop variable `kickoff` at line 379 was shadowing the outer
`kickoff: AgentMailMessage | null` variable declared at line 278.
Renamed to `kickoffEntry` for clarity.
